name: Group A Streptococcus Testing Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for Group A streptococcus testing including rapid antigen detection tests, throat cultures, and nucleic acid amplification tests. Used in the appropriate testing for pharyngitis (CWP) measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Infectious agent antigen detection by immunoassay, direct observation; Streptococcus, Group A (rapid strep test)
Culture, presumptive, pathogenic organisms, screening only; with colony estimation (throat culture)
Infectious agent antigen detection by enzyme immunoassay technique; Streptococcus, Group A
Infectious agent detection by nucleic acid (DNA or RNA); Streptococcus, Group A, amplified probe technique
Infectious agent detection by nucleic acid (DNA or RNA); Streptococcus, Group A, quantification
